title: disa clavicornis
intro: Disa clavicornis, also known as the 'Buckthorn Disa', is a species of orchid native to South Africa. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Disa clavicornis include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Disa clavicornis can be made by infusing the plant's roots in water, and it is often used as a treatment in traditional African medicine.
